chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-254 of 2024 (Nirmal John Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 1162/2024 (U/A) 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on CMA No. 1066/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For Orders on CMA No. 1067/2024 (Stay). 5. For hearing of main case. 21-03-2024. The petitioner in person. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the respondents to regularize his services. On asking, the petitioner was fair enough to admit that his services have already been dispensed with by the respondents. If it is so then discontinued service of the petitioner could not be directed to be continued under the deception of regularization; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed application. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
